hero.subtitle: Specialist in authentic kalei works for interior and exterior for 10 years. Active throughout Belgium and internationally. A dedicated team of two craftsmen for a personal approach.

about.title: 10 years of Craftsmanship.
about.subtitle: Craftsmanship & Passion
about.description: We work with a dedicated team of two craftsmen. This allows us to personally follow up on every project and guarantee a careful and high-quality execution from start to finish. Our passion lies in restoring the authentic appearance of your home, both in Belgium and abroad.

features.title: The art of kalei.
features.subtitle: An ancient technique with modern benefits. The perfect balance between aesthetics and functionality.

items.title: Breathable protection
items.desc: Kalei provides an authentic look and allows walls to breathe, preventing moisture problems.

items.title: Mineral pigments
items.desc: We mix our colors ourselves with mineral pigments for a unique, natural appearance.

items.title: Hydrofuge finish
items.desc: Optional water-repellent treatment for extra protection against moisture and dirt.
